overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be from a survival horror or exploration video game, featuring dense vegetation and trees lining a narrow dirt path with very limited visibility.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt path, illuminating the dark forest ahead with a flashlight while navigating between dense vegetation

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with scattered stones and patches of grass illuminated by the flashlight
dense green shrubs and ferns lining the left side of the path
thick undergrowth and bushes on the right side of the trail
tall tree trunk with smooth light-colored bark visible on the right side of the path
dense overhead tree cover creating a dark tunnel effect ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the immediate path ahead, revealing thick underbrush on both sides and a prominent tree trunk on the right. The environment is quiet and isolated, with deep darkness beyond the light's reach creating an enclosed, atmospheric setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a claustrophobic forest trail shrouded in midnight darkness. It begins by advancing along a narrow dirt path, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the gloom to reveal the immediate terrain. As the camera moves deeper into the woods, the light exposes thick underbrush crowding both sides of the trail and a prominent tree trunk looming on the right. The scene maintains this oppressive atmosphere of isolation, with the surrounding environment remaining a void of deep darkness beyond the reach of the lamp.
